[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100001111 5
1 0010000011 3
2 0010010000 2
3 0000111110 5
4 0011111110 7
5 1111010101 7
6 1111111111 a
7 1000100011 4

01 0010111010 5
12 0000000000 a
23 0101101101 6
34 1000000010 2
45 0011010000 3
56 1100101100 5
67 0001000000 1
70 1100000001 3

02 0010010000 2 match 2
13 0101000101 4
24 1000100011 4 match 7
35 0000000010 1
46 0110001100 4
57 0000000000 a
60 0000000000 a
71 0000111010 4

03 0011111100 6
14 1000000001 2
25 0001000011 3
36 1000000010 2
47 0011000000 2
50 1100000000 2
61 0000010000 1
72 0000010000 1

04 0000100010 2
15 0001000001 2
26 1100101111 7
37 0000000000 a
40 0100000000 1
51 0000101000 2
62 0000010000 1
73 0100111101 6

05 0011010010 4
16 1100000101 4
27 0001000000 1

41 0010011000 3
52 0000000000 a

74 1000100011 4 match 7

06 0010101110 5
17 0001000000 1

53 0100101100 4

75 0000010011 3

07 0011000000 2

32 0000000000 a
